name: Fujian Raynen Technology Co., Ltd.
summary: Fujian Raynen Technology Co., Ltd. engages in the distribution of IC products in China. The company also researches, develops, produces, and sells computer control systems for knitting machines and textile servo drivers. Its products include flat knitting machine computer control systems, vamp flat knitting machine computer control systems, operation boxes, main controllers, take-down comb controllers, carriage controllers, and integrated power supply products; and single-axis and digital dual-axis servo drivers. In addition, the company is involved in various activities, including application software development for knitting industry, industrial electrical automation products distribution, system integration, etc. Fujian Raynen Technology Co., Ltd. was formerly known as Fujian Raynen Electronics Co., Ltd. and changed its name to Fujian Raynen Technology Co., Ltd. in 2013. The company was founded in 2007 and is headquartered in Fuzhou, China.
